_comment: Source whitelist + URL templates. confidence (critical/high/medium) feeds Phase 1 source-confidence labeling. {ticker}/{cik} are template variables.

edgar.notes: 8-K filings = official material events. Fastest legal source; highest confidence.

yahoo.notes: DISABLED 2026-04-28: yfinance returns faulty response from Yahoo (anti-bot block). Most Yahoo Finance content is covered via Finviz aggregation + Google News. Re-enable when yfinance lib catches up.

finviz.notes: Aggregator; high editorial filter. Requires User-Agent header.

competitor_finviz.feeds_into: data collection only — pipeline forces verdict=REVIEW
competitor_finviz.notes: T1 data collection (commit 2026-04-28). Iterates each ticker's competitor_tickers list (tickers.json) and pulls Finviz news for each competitor. Items get ticker_hint=target, source=competitor_finviz; pipeline routes to REVIEW without LLM. Run for ≥1 week, then analyze qc/daily-report and processed-log to decide whether to crystallize patterns into competitor-impact-rules.json (T2).

google_news.notes: Topic/keyword-driven. Used for non-ticker-specific signal (FDA news, DOE policy, uranium market). Lowest precision; relies hardest on LLM oracle.
